sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 583 — Mark Antony and Octavian. M. Barbatius Pollio, moneyer. Ca. 41 BC. Silver Denarius (3.69g), 41 BC. Struck in Ephesus spring-summer 41 BC. Bare head of Antony facing r. Reverse:  Bare head of Octavian
sales.description:
Mark Antony and Octavian. M. Barbatius Pollio, moneyer. Ca. 41 BC. Silver Denarius (3.69g), 41 BC. Struck in Ephesus spring-summer 41 BC. Bare head of Antony facing r. Reverse:  Bare head of Octavian facing r. S-1504; RSC 8. RRC 517/2. NGC Choice XF, Strike: 4/5, Surface: 4/5.  Lustrous surfaces and lightly toned.  Estimated Value $2,000 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
